title: audit — HTTP routes
description: Platform admin cross-workspace surface + minimal workspace DPO surface. Read-only — audits never mutable via HTTP.

groups.name: workspace-audits
groups.description: Workspace DPO surface. Sensitive fields masked; heavy rate limit.

routes.description: Workspace admin sees own workspace audit rows. Restricted-tier fields masked as `[REDACTED]` unless caller has audit.view-restricted.

groups.name: platform-audits
groups.description: Platform-admin cross-workspace surface. Full field access for compliance investigation.

routes.description: Trigger VerifyAuditChainJob for a workspace. Returns job id + streams results.
Trigger ExportAuditForDsarJob for a specific user_id. Compliance-DPO endpoint. Produces a signed download URL via storage module.
